final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the RAN QIU brand (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" aesthetic with "极简主义", "自然诗意", and "温暖治愈" mood — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-and-color tradition, 侘寂 wabi-sabi philosophy, MUJI brand identity heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include ample negative space (留白), shallow depth of field
Subject: must include the "RAN QIU" brand wordmark/logo
Scene/backdrop: must include natural autumn elements with warm golden hour atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a "金色时光" warm golden hour atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must include #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve brand color values exactly as specified
Avoid:
